meta.title: Learn — football prediction methods explained | BetsPlug
meta.description: Deep guides on Elo, Poisson, machine learning, value betting, and bankroll management. Learn the math behind AI football predictions.

hero.subheadline: Deep guides on the statistical models, betting concepts, and analytical frameworks behind data-driven football predictions. No fluff. Just the actual math.

articles.title: Expected goals (xG) explained
articles.excerpt: How xG measures shot quality and predicts long-term team performance better than traditional goal counts.

articles.title: Elo rating system for football
articles.excerpt: The dynamic ranking system that adjusts team strength after every match. Originally for chess, now powering modern football predictions.

articles.title: Poisson goal models
articles.excerpt: The mathematical distribution that predicts the probability of specific match scores based on attacking and defensive rates.

articles.title: What is value betting?
articles.excerpt: Why finding bets with positive expected value is the only mathematically sound long-term strategy. The difference between predicting and profiting.

articles.title: The Kelly criterion
articles.excerpt: The mathematical formula for optimal bet sizing based on edge and odds. Why most bettors size bets wrong.

articles.title: Bankroll management
articles.excerpt: How to manage your prediction following capital so short-term variance doesn't destroy long-term results.

articles.title: AI vs human tipsters
articles.excerpt: The structural advantages and limitations of AI-driven predictions versus human expertise. Where each excels.

paragraphs: Most football prediction sites either treat their methods as 'proprietary secrets' or oversimplify them to seem user-friendly. Both approaches fail readers who genuinely want to understand what's happening.

Our learn section explains the actual mathematics behind our predictions — Elo ratings, Poisson distributions, machine learning patterns — at a level that respects your intelligence. If you're ready to learn, the depth is here.
These articles also cover concepts every serious bettor should understand: value betting, Kelly criterion, bankroll management. Knowing how predictions work helps you use them effectively.

finalCta.h2: Ready to see these concepts in action?
finalCta.body: Same engine, same methodology — applied across 30+ leagues every day.
